_comment: Tier-2 for dealii adaptive_refinement#: probe install feature flags from config.h to expose the gap between catalog claims (p4est, MPI, PETSc, Trilinos, SLEPc) and what the current conda-forge dealii-9.1.1 install actually has compiled. The 9.1.1 default has all parallelism features UNDEFINED — a serial-only build. This fixture PASSES whenever it can detect ANY dealii install and produce a feature report; it fails only when config.h is missing entirely. Output 'catalog_claims_install_doesnt_support' is the falsification ledger for the current install state — when task #30 (deal.II rebuild) lands, the same fixture will record an empty ledger. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
